{{Infobox technique
| name = Final Sword
| introduced = cradle-07-uncrowned
}}

''See also: [[Final Sword Timeline]]''

== Overview ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|The Final [[Sword]] is a powerful combat technique used by [[Yerin]]. It can be manifested as a massive, translucent [[madra]] replica of her actual weapon, complete with a hilt and guard. While the technique can appear as a [[sword]]-shaped beam of energy or a silver-and-red wave of light, it has also been seen as a rougher beam of red-chrome energy that sounds like an explosion. The technique is highly dependent on the availability of [[aura]], making it difficult to utilize in environments where [[aura]] is being consumed. [[Yerin]] has been known to use the technique by concentrating its power through her blade or by condensing it for specific strikes. Other entities have also demonstrated versions of this technique, including [[Ruby]], who uses a version powered by [[blood madra]], and [[Yerin]]'s parasite, the [[Blood Shadow]], which possesses its own version despite never having practiced it.}}

== Uncrowned ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|The [[Final Sword]] is an adaptation of the [[Sword Sage]]’s strike designed by [[Lindon]] and [[Yerin]].<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c20">''Uncrowned'', chapter 20</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|The [[Final Sword]] is a massive [[madra]] replica of [[Yerin]]'s weapon.<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c20" />}}

== Wintersteel ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Lindon]] mentions the [[Final Sword]] in relation to [[Yerin]].<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c5">''Wintersteel'', chapter 5</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|The [[Final Sword]] is a technique [[Yerin]] cycles for.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c11">''Wintersteel'', chapter 11</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Yerin]] poured [[madra]] and [[aura]] into a [[Final Sword]].<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c25">''Wintersteel'', chapter 25</ref>}}

== Bloodline ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|The [[Final Sword]] is a technique that can spear through a flock of venomous birds.<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c5">''Bloodline'', chapter 5</ref>}}

== Reaper ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|The [[Final Sword]] requires [[aura]] to use.<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c14">''Reaper'', chapter 14</ref>}}

== Dreadgod ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|[[Yerin]]'s [[Final Sword]] is a silver-red [[sword]] of light.<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c3">''Dreadgod'', chapter 3</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|[[Yerin]] unleashed the [[Final Sword]].<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c19">''Dreadgod'', chapter 19</ref>}}

== Waybound ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|The [[Final Sword]] is a technique named by [[Yerin]] and the [[Phoenix]].<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c30">''Waybound'', chapter 30</ref>}}

== Notable quotes ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|“We need to spar a few rounds. There are a few ideas I have to work out after our match, and I know she could be more comfortable with the Final Sword—"<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c5" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

[[Category:Techniques]]
[[Category:Uncrowned]]
[[Category:Wintersteel]]
[[Category:Bloodline]]
[[Category:Reaper]]
[[Category:Dreadgod]]
[[Category:Waybound]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
